_publications._publicationTitle: The Relationship Between Heart Rate Variability, Psychological Flexibility, and Pain in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: HRV was negatively correlated with psychological inflexibility (r = −0.50, P < 0.01)...psychological inflexibility significantly predicted HRV (β = −0.58, t = −2.83, P < 0.05)
details: Psychological inflexibility showed significant negative correlation with HF-HRV (r = −0.50, P < 0.01) and significantly predicted HRV (β = −0.58, t = −2.83, P < 0.05)
